text: C2PA (Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity, founded by Adobe/Microsoft/Intel/BBC) provides an open technical standard for cryptographically binding provenance metadata to digital content.

SynthID (Google DeepMind 2024) embeds imperceptible digital watermarks into AI-generated images, audio, and text that persist through editing and compression, enabling reliable AI content identification.

Deepfake detection has evolved from handcrafted features to deep learning-based detectors, but remains a cat-and-mouse game as generation techniques (GANs, diffusion models) improve. The field increasingly focuses on provenance rather than detection alone.
